mapper.insert: insert into user_behavior(user_id, behavior_type, target_id, target_type, content, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{behaviorType}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{content}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select count(*) from user_behavior where create_time between #{startDate} and #{endDate}
select count(distinct user_id) from user_behavior where create_time between #{startDate} and #{endDate}
select target_type as feature, count(*) as cnt from user_behavior group by target_type order by cnt desc limit #{limit}
select count(*) from user_behavior where target_type = #{targetType} and create_time between #{startDate} and #{endDate}

choose.when: select date(create_time) as date, count(*) as cnt from user_behavior where behavior_type = 'register' and create_time between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by date(create_time)
choose.otherwise: select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%u') as week, count(*) as cnt from user_behavior where behavior_type = 'register' and create_time between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%u')

choose.when: select date(create_time) as date, count(*) as cnt from user_behavior where behavior_type = 'login' and create_time between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by date(create_time)
choose.otherwise: select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%u') as week, count(*) as cnt from user_behavior where behavior_type = 'login' and create_time between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%u')
